title: <div>  •  The False Prophet’s Silence → Purging results in losing all persuasive
content:
• The False Prophet’s Silence → Purging results in losing all persuasive abilities (ex: debates, negotiations, fate manipulation).
• The Exiled Monarch’s Isolation → Can never rejoin a faction and must remain completely independent.

📜 Why This Works:
✔ Keeps purging meaningful—no one can erase their identity without severe consequences.
✔ Makes students think twice before abandoning their role.
✔ Ensures that purges do not function as an “easy escape.”

📜 4. Rituals, Purges, & Fate Manipulations Require Physical Components

📜 Every major event now has a required physical or performative action.

✔ What Physical Rituals Could Include:
• Writing on Paper → A student must inscribe a contract, spell, or sacrifice note.
• Symbolic Drawing → A sigil, tarot card pull, or physical representation of the change.
context: From document: RPG Character System (Fully Integrated into Weekly Modules) — chunk 534 (chunk 534/555)
